subject: Quick question about Gmail's growth
body:
Hi there,

I've been following Gmail and think there's a great fit here.

We help companies like Gmail Subject: Quick question about {{company_name}}'s growth

Hi {{first_name}},

I noticed {{company_name}} has been scaling fast — congrats on the recent growth.

We've been helping similar companies in {{industry}} reduce {{pain_point}} by up to 40% without adding headcount.

Would it make sense to hop on a quick 15-min call to see if we could do the same for {{company_name}}?

Best,
{{sender_name}}
{{sender_company}}.

Would you be open to a quick 15-minute call this week to discuss how we could help?

Best regards,
